zh: 常帶小孩到孩童遊樂場、
en: Take your child to playgrounds often.

zh: 都能提供孩童前庭覺、運動覺、觸覺等感覺的運動機會、
en: provide exercise for their vestibular, kinesthetic, and tactile senses.

zh: 這些活動對某些孩童起先可能深感恐懼、
en: Some children may feel afraid of these at first,

zh: 家長應以漸進和緩的方式、
en: and parents should use a gentle, gradual approach,

zh: 誘導他們樂於參與這些活動、
en: enticing them to enjoy these activities,
while offering help from the side.
